mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, executor_id AS executorId, client_name AS clientName, client_secret_hash AS clientSecretHash, status, expire_time AS expireTime, last_connected_at AS lastConnectedAt, last_disconnected_at AS lastDisconnectedAt, last_handshake_error AS lastHandshakeError, agent_version AS agentVersion, machine_name AS machineName, create_user_id AS createUserId, create_user_name AS createUserName, create_time AS createTime, update_user_id AS updateUserId, update_user_name AS updateUserName, update_time AS updateTime, reserve, remark FROM agent_client WHERE id = #{id} FOR UPDATE
